title: Government agency data
description: Check whether data is available from government agencies.
keywords: government pre-fill, prefill government data, government data prefill, government prefill availability

rows: Department of Employment and Workplace Relations

content_blocks.text: You will need to check and manually enter some natural disaster payments in your tax return. To find out if you need to report these payments, see Tax and super support in difficult times .
To check the pre-fill availability of other data, go to Pre-fill availability .

content_text:
Data available | Agency name
Available | Services Australia (Centrelink)
Available | Department of Employment and Workplace Relations
Available | Department of Veterans' Affairs
You will need to check and manually enter some natural disaster payments in your tax return. To find out if you need to report these payments, see Tax and super support in difficult times .
To check the pre-fill availability of other data, go to Pre-fill availability .
